Design_Description: Add a single `(70, 70)` learnable additive attention bias parameter, zero-initialized, passed as `attn_mask` to the query self-attention in `_DecoderLayer`.

Add a `(70, 70)` learnable additive attention bias, initialized from the SMPL-X/BEDLAM2 kinematic graph (`+0.5` for adjacent joints, `0.0` otherwise, `-0.5` on pelvis token 0 diagonal), passed as `attn_mask` to query self-attention.

Add `num_heads` independent `(70, 70)` learnable attention bias matrices, all zero-initialized, expanded to `(B * num_heads, 70, 70)` and passed as `attn_mask` to query self-attention, giving each head a separate structural specialisation.
